category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Oman market (MOCIIP / DGSM conformity, GSO lighting standards, GSO energy-efficiency labelling, TRA radio approval).

title.en: China-to-Oman LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入阿曼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入阿曼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Oman market requirements administered by MOCIIP and DGSM (Directorate General for Standards and Metrology): GSO-adopted lighting safety standards (GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471), GSO energy-efficiency labelling for lighting, and TRA radio approval for smart luminaires, versus Chinese GB / GB-T standards and CCC certification. Oman grid is 240 V 50 Hz.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与阿曼市场要求对照，阿曼市场由 MOCIIP 与 DGSM（标准与计量总局）管理：GSO 采纳的照明安全标准（GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、GSO 照明能效标签，以及智能灯具的 TRA 无线电核准，与中国 GB / GB-T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。阿曼电网为 240 V 50 Hz。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與阿曼市場要求對照，阿曼市場由 MOCIIP 與 DGSM（標準與計量總局）管理：GSO 採納的照明安全標準（GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、GSO 照明能效標籤，以及智能燈具的 TRA 無線電核准，與中國 GB / GB-T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。阿曼電網為 240 V 50 Hz。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Oman law, MOCIIP / DGSM technical regulations, adopted GSO and GSO/IEC standards, GSO energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, and TRA radio-equipment requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement. An in-country registered importer is generally required.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿曼法律、MOCIIP / DGSM 技术法规、采纳的 GSO 及 GSO/IEC 标准、GSO 能效标签阈值及 TRA 无线电设备要求。通常须有在地注册进口商。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿曼法律、MOCIIP / DGSM 技術法規、採納的 GSO 及 GSO/IEC 標準、GSO 能效標籤閾值及 TRA 無線電設備要求。通常須有在地註冊進口商。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Oman must meet MOCIIP / DGSM (Directorate General for Standards and Metrology) conformity and registration requirements via an in-country registered importer; comply with GSO-adopted lighting safety standards (GSO IEC 60598-1 for luminaires, GSO IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, GSO IEC 61347 for control gear); demonstrate electromagnetic compatibility consistent with GSO/CISPR 15 emission requirements; carry a GSO energy-efficiency label for lighting where the product is in scope; document photobiological safety per GSO IEC 62471; obtain TRA (Telecommunications Regulatory Authority) type approval for any smart / wireless luminaire; and design for a 240 V 50 Hz grid (same 50 Hz as China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V). Oman applies GSO standards that adopt IEC, so CN test reports built on IEC-aligned GB standards can reduce re-testing, but the conformity, labelling, and importer-registration steps are separate from China's CCC scheme. There is no horizontal RoHS-type substance restriction in Oman equivalent to China's GB/T 26572 disclosure regime.
answer_first.zh: 向阿曼出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：经在地注册进口商满足 MOCIIP / DGSM（标准与计量总局）的合格评定及注册要求；符合 GSO 采纳的照明安全标准（灯具用 GSO IEC 60598-1、自镇流灯用 GSO IEC 62560、控制装置用 GSO IEC 61347）；证明电磁兼容性符合 GSO/CISPR 15 发射要求；在产品属适用范围时贴附 GSO 照明能效标签；按 GSO IEC 62471 记录光生物安全；为任何智能/无线灯具取得 TRA（电信监管局）型号核准；并按 240 V 50 Hz 电网设计（与中国同为 50 Hz，但标称电压不同于中国的 220 V）。阿曼适用采纳 IEC 的 GSO 标准，因此基于 IEC 对齐的 GB 标准的中国检测报告可减少重新测试，但合格评定、贴标及进口商注册步骤独立于中国 CCC 制度。阿曼不存在与中国 GB/T 26572 披露制度等效的横向 RoHS 类物质限制。
answer_first.zht: 向阿曼出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：經在地註冊進口商滿足 MOCIIP / DGSM（標準與計量總局）的合格評定及註冊要求；符合 GSO 採納的照明安全標準（燈具用 GSO IEC 60598-1、自鎮流燈用 GSO IEC 62560、控制裝置用 GSO IEC 61347）；證明電磁兼容性符合 GSO/CISPR 15 發射要求；在產品屬適用範圍時貼附 GSO 照明能效標籤；按 GSO IEC 62471 記錄光生物安全；為任何智能/無線燈具取得 TRA（電信監管局）型號核准；並按 240 V 50 Hz 電網設計（與中國同為 50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220 V）。阿曼適用採納 IEC 的 GSO 標準，因此基於 IEC 對齊的 GB 標準的中國檢測報告可減少重新測試，但合格評定、貼標及進口商註冊步驟獨立於中國 CCC 制度。阿曼不存在與中國 GB/T 26572 披露制度等效的橫向 RoHS 類物質限制。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon any MOCIIP / DGSM technical regulation update or GSO standard revision
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. GSO energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, adopted GSO/IEC lighting standard editions, and TRA radio-approval scope must be re-verified against the current MOCIIP / DGSM and GSO references on each review cycle.
